source.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults with suspected or established chronic heart failure.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist cardiovascular care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult chronic-heart-failure diagnosis, review, monitoring, and clinician-led management; international only and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.12 — history, examination, natriuretic peptides, imaging, ECG, and laboratory tests

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinical history and examination, NT-proBNP, echocardiography, ECG, chest X-ray, renal, thyroid, liver, lipid, glucose, blood count, and urinalysis review.

items.rationale: The NICE heart-failure section supports documenting the echocardiogram source and date, reason for review, symptom and examination context, and clinician review of cardiac structure or function when heart failure is suspected; it does not create an interpretation or diagnosis.

items.final_wording: Supports murmur nature, family and medical history, symptoms, peripheral signs, abnormal ECG, and clinician-led echocardiography review.

source.title: Heart valve disease presenting in adults: investigation and management
source.population: Adults with suspected or established heart valve disease, including adults with a cardiac murmur.
source.setting: Primary, secondary, and specialist cardiovascular care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult murmur assessment, echocardiography, specialist referral, and valve-disease monitoring; not applicable to children and not directly validated for UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports murmur nature, family and medical history, symptoms, peripheral signs, abnormal ECG, and clinician-led echocardiography review.

items.rationale: The NICE valve section confirms echocardiography relevance for clinician-assessed murmur and valve-disease context; it is conditional and does not classify a valve lesion.

items.final_wording: Supports regular primary-care review, record updates, medicine review, functional assessment, deterioration review, follow-up planning, and specialist access.

source.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults with suspected or established chronic heart failure.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist cardiovascular care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult chronic-heart-failure diagnosis, review, monitoring, and clinician-led management; international only and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.4–1.1.9 — primary-care review, record, care plan, and access

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports regular primary-care review, record updates, medicine review, functional assessment, deterioration review, follow-up planning, and specialist access.

items.rationale: The review section supports documenting clinician explanation, an entered plan, safety-net discussion, and arranged follow-up without generating management.
